name: City of Santa Maria

fireAgency.name: Santa Maria Fire Department
fireAgency.planCheckPath: Internal routing through Community Development — do NOT submit separately to SMFD
fireAgency.contact: Fire Marshal Jim Austin — jaustin@cityofsantamaria.org — (805) 925-0951 ext. 1578
fireAgency.localAmendment: Automatic sprinkler threshold 5,000 sf for Group B (vs CBC 12,000 sf)

wuiNotes: Only Moderate FHSZ in two small pockets: (1) NE near Santa Maria River riverbed, (2) SW near Santa Maria Public Airport. No Very High or High FHSZ. Moderate FHSZ does NOT trigger CWUIC construction requirements. Parcel-level verification required.

healthDept.name: Santa Barbara County Environmental Health Services
healthDept.address: 2125 S Centerpointe Pkwy, Santa Maria, CA 93455
healthDept.note: County health dept handles food facility plan review — not the City
